div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between gap-2 mt-1 w-100 ab_pos_line_balance_panel

button.class: btn p-0 border-0 bg-transparent d-inline-flex align-items-center gap-1 o_ab_sales_balance_btn ab_pos_line_btn_open_store_balance
button.title: Balance

i.t-attf-class: #{(((line.balance_total !== undefined && line.balance_total !== null) ? line.balance_total : line.balance) || 0) > 0 ? 'fa fa-cubes text-success' : 'text-muted'}

span.t-attf-class: #{(((line.balance_total !== undefined && line.balance_total !== null) ? line.balance_total : line.balance) || 0) > 0 ? 'fw-semibold text-success' : 'text-muted'}
span.t-esc: formatQty(((line.balance_total !== undefined && line.balance_total !== null) ? line.balance_total : line.balance) || 0)

span.class: ab_pos_line_cell_code small text-muted text-center flex-grow-1 d-inline-flex align-items-center justify-content-center gap-1

button.class: btn p-0 border-0 bg-transparent d-inline-flex align-items-center gap-1 text-muted ab_pos_line_btn_refresh_pos_balance
button.title: Balance
